title: New filter captures and recycles aluminum from manufacturing waste
summary: MIT engineers developed a nanofiltration process that can capture more than 99% of aluminum ions from manufacturing waste streams similar to those produced by aluminum plants. The recovered aluminum could be upcycled back into production, which may increase yield and reduce hazardous waste.

title: 3 technologies helping the aluminium industry decarbonize
summary: This article highlights technologies aimed at reducing emissions in aluminum production, including Hydro’s HalZero process and innovations that improve recycled aluminum quality. It also notes that aluminum production is a major industrial source of CO2 emissions, making decarbonization a key sustainability challenge.

title: Current Challenges and Opportunities for the Aluminum Transformation Industry in the United States
summary: The article identifies two major priorities for the aluminum industry: reducing greenhouse gas emissions and increasing recycling rates. It frames these as central challenges in the industry's transformation toward greater sustainability.

title: HRC Steel rises to highest level since December 2023
summary: Trading Economics reports that HRC steel increased to 1143.00 USD/T, its highest level since December 2023. The page also notes a 1.28% gain over the past four weeks, indicating continued upward momentum in steel prices.

title: Steel price rebounds to 3159 CNY/T as market remains volatile
summary: Trading Economics says steel rose to 3159 CNY/T on June 5, 2026, up 0.25% from the previous day. Despite the daily increase, the price is still down 2.47% over the past month, showing a mixed short-term trend.

title: Steel prices weakened recently as Asian spreads approach a 15-year low
summary: This segment says steel prices have weakened recently, weighing on margins for steel companies in the near term. It also highlights that Asian steel spreads are near a 15-year low, with weak Chinese demand cited as a key factor.

title: Steel Price News: Are Prices About to Drop? Latest Hot Rolled Coil analysis
summary: Ryerson’s market update says increased demand and constrained supply have pushed steel pricing higher. It also notes that lead times for many steel products have extended into June, suggesting tight market conditions.

title: U.S. Steel Manufacturers Plan Near-Term Capacity Additions
summary: Steel manufacturers across the U.S. are planning more than $6 billion in capital-spending projects set to begin in the second quarter of 2026. The projects are largely tied to specific customers, and the article says electric arc furnace technology is increasingly replacing traditional blast-furnace technology.

title: Industry Data
summary: AISI reports that U.S. domestic raw steel production in the week ending May 30, 2026 was 1,872,000 net tons, with a capability utilization rate of 81.1%. This is relevant current capacity and production data, though it is not a news article.

title: How Steel Tech Startups are Disrupting Traditional Manufacturing
summary: This article covers how steel technology startups are using smart automation, AI, and more sustainable manufacturing processes to reshape traditional production. It highlights eco-friendly production lines that reduce emissions, recycle waste materials, and cut back on trash.

title: Copper - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: Copper futures declined toward $6.4 per pound, retreating from record highs as markets priced in the possibility of tighter monetary policy. The page frames the move as part of a broader market trend in which copper remains highly sensitive to macroeconomic expectations.

title: Copper futures price today
summary: Investing.com shows copper futures at 6.4238, below the previous close of 6.5290. This supports the view that copper prices were trading lower on the day, consistent with a pullback after recent strength.

title: Copper Market News & Forecasts
summary: Fastmarkets reports that several copper producers, including Atlas Mining, posted higher first-quarter 2026 earnings due to elevated copper prices. The coverage also points to ongoing tightness in concentrate output, which is a key supply-side factor for the market.

title: Copper Rate in India Today Live
summary: The Economic Times highlights copper’s recent strength, noting it is up 9% since the Iran war and near its January peak. It also raises the question of whether AI-driven demand and supply shortages could push the metal to new highs.

title: Copper Rebounds From 6-Week Lows After Outages At Major Mines, Limited New Project Development
summary: This report says copper prices rebounded after outages at major mines and limited new project development tightened supply. It also notes that slow Chinese demand has helped keep prices from rising even faster.

title: Copper Prices Are at a Record High on Supply Stress
summary: This video discusses copper reaching record highs after a major industry conference in Shanghai highlighted signs of supply stress. It points to concerns that there is not enough supply to meet demand from new smelters worldwide.

title: Copper Hits Record High Amid Global Shortage
summary: This segment covers copper prices surging to record levels amid a global shortage. It features commentary on the recent price spike and the market’s supply constraints.

title: Copper Archives
summary: MINING.COM’s copper archive includes recent coverage on copper concentrate waivers and Mopani Copper Mines. The page is a news hub that may contain current articles related to production and capacity developments.

title: Copper Market News & Forecasts
summary: Fastmarkets’ copper market page highlights news on output and market conditions, including a reported surge in own-sourced copper output from Glencore’s African assets. It is a relevant source for current production and capacity updates.

title: Rewiring a sustainable, clean energy future with copper
summary: Copper’s high electrical conductivity makes it essential for a net-zero energy system because it helps reduce electricity losses as power grids expand. The article emphasizes copper’s role in clean energy infrastructure and frames sustainability as central to meeting future demand.

title: Rewiring a sustainable, clean energy future with copper
summary: The article highlights how recycling, resource efficiency, and technological innovation are being used to keep copper production sustainable. It presents copper as a key material for the energy transition while emphasizing industry efforts to lower environmental impacts.

title: Copper's role in the energy transition grows as demand surges
summary: EY says copper companies are increasing production while also adopting sustainability measures and digital innovations. The piece links copper demand to renewable energy, electric vehicles, and infrastructure, making sustainability a core part of industry strategy.

title: Copper must scale up production within sustainable limits
summary: The article discusses the tension between expanding copper output and reducing the industry’s environmental footprint. It argues that growth must happen within sustainable limits as copper demand rises.

title: Copper for Tomorrow: Sustainable copper production
summary: This article describes an initiative focused on solving value-chain challenges to increase sustainable copper production. The emphasis is on innovation aimed at improving how copper is produced and supplied.

title: Nickel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: Nickel prices were down slightly on June 5, 2026, trading at 18,611.25 USD/T, a 0.10% decline from the previous day. The prior day’s close was also lower, suggesting continued softness in the market over the last 24 hours.

title: Nickel Futures Price Today
summary: Investing.com shows nickel futures at 18,529.38, compared with a previous close of 18,620.88. This indicates a modest intraday decline and aligns with broader weakness in nickel pricing.

title: Nickel Prices 2026 - Chart, Trends Analysis & Forecast
summary: IMARC’s latest update highlights a sharp month-over-month rise in nickel prices in May 2026, with Northeast Asia at USD 21.45/kg and Europe at USD 19.58/kg. The report points to regional price increases and broader market trend analysis, offering context for recent volatility.

title: Nickel prices, news and market analysis
summary: Fastmarkets provides ongoing nickel pricing, news, and market analysis focused on volatility and dynamics in the battery raw materials segment. The page is a market-tracking resource rather than a single dated article, but it reflects current nickel market coverage.

title: LME Nickel
summary: The LME nickel page provides current and historical nickel prices, stocks, and monthly averages. It is a primary market reference for tracking nickel pricing trends and recent movements.

title: Unleashing sustainable nickel production for a net zero future
summary: This article examines how optimizing nickel production can support a more sustainable battery industry and a net-zero future. It emphasizes ESG integration, responsible investment, stakeholder engagement, and stronger ESG reporting as key responses to the industry’s environmental challenges.

title: 3 Questions: Can we secure a sustainable supply of nickel?
source: MIT Department of Materials Science and Engineering
summary: The article discusses whether nickel, a critical material for clean energy technologies, can be supplied sustainably. It highlights the need for stronger environmental and community protections, harmonized sustainability standards, technology transfer, and responsible investment to stabilize the nickel supply chain.

title: Innovations in Sustainable Nickel Production: The Path to Low-Cost Solutions
summary: This piece focuses on new approaches in nickel mining and refining that aim to reduce costs while improving environmental performance. It frames sustainable production as a key direction for the rapidly changing global nickel market.
